name: Frost Alchemist Han
personality: precise, believes cold enhances pill quality, dismisses southern alchemy as 'sauna brewing'
speech: precise, cold humor, compares everything to temperature
relationship_to_wanglin: neutral — interested in southern reagents she has never seen
initiation_lines: A pill refined at sub-zero temperature is four times more potent. This is not theory. This is measurement.
A Luo He Sect alchemist visited once. He tried to refine underwater. The cold here is better. Water freezes. Pills crystallize.
The Vermilion Bird Capital sends us emeralds for our frost pills. They use them to cool temples. We use them to survive.
Snowballs and glass bottles — the cold here is a reagent, not a hazard. Bring them and I will show you.

sect_tasks.name: Frost Pill Reagents
sect_tasks.description: Alchemist Han needs snowballs and glass bottles to refine frost-resistance pills.

sect_tasks.name: Cold Furnace Fuel
sect_tasks.description: Coal and blue ice are needed to maintain the sub-zero alchemical furnace.
